zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Aguillon於大約1186年出生在英國素可維提哈姆時，他的父親Reginald Aguillon32歲，母親Agatha Beauffou23歲。他於大約1209年與Margery Fresney在英國結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1249年在英國素瑞阿丁頓,第一代西德默斯子爵享年65歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Aguillon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Francisco, Jesus, Pablo, Juan, Agustin, Carlos, Ernesto, Manuel, Roberto, Ruben, Santiago.
habitational name from any of several places called Aguillón in Spain (Asturias or Galicia), or Aguillon in Var, France.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Aguillon was born about 1186, in Withyham, Sussex, England, his father, Reginald Aguillon, was 32 and his mother, Agatha Beauffou, was 23. He married Margery Fresney about 1209, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. He died about 1249, in Addington, Surrey, England, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Aguillon est né environ 1186, à Withyham, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Reginald Aguillon, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Agatha Beauffou, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Margery Fresney environ 1209, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Il est décédé environ 1249, à Addington, Surrey, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans.

Er hat um 1209 in England Margery Fresney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Er starb um 1249 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Addington, Surrey, England.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Aguillon родился около 1186 г. в местности витихам, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Reginald Aguillon было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Agatha Beauffou, 23.
